element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Introductory levels teach standard beat-em-up mechanics with basic enemy waves

element_introduction_order.element: Summoned ally system (Captain America, Black Cat, Iron Fist, etc.)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Power-ups hidden in set locations; different heroes favor Spider-Man or Venom differently, requiring strategic resource management
Major story villains encountered as level/stage culminations; difficulty escalates through villain roster
Epic final battle requires mastery of all combat mechanics and summoned ally synergies

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Throughout (implied by sewer-based criminal empire setting)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Level-to-level environmental variation supports pacing and visual storytelling

typical_relief_triggers: Summoning allied heroes via collected power-ups
Defeating villain boss and advancing narrative
Comic-styled cutscenes between levels (narrative breathing room)
typical_tension_triggers: Hidden power-up locations requiring exploration under pressure
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Side-scrolling beat-em-up with cyclical tension: standard enemy wave → boss encounter → narrative interlude → next stage. Combat intensity varies by ally availability. Game noted as 'overly long and repetitive' suggesting sustained moderate tension rather than sharp peaks

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Power-ups for summoned heroes hidden in set locations throughout levels; exploration encouraged

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to Spider-Man/Venom combat mechanics; basic enemy waves establish baseline difficulty
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating boss roster (Shriek, Doppelganger, Demogoblin, Carrion) increases mechanical demands; ally summoning system becomes critical for progression
difficulty_curve.late_game: Carnage final boss and team battle; all combat systems and ally synergies required for victory
notable_spikes: First major boss encounter (Carnage meeting scene breaks up Spider-Man vs Venom fight)
Demogoblin transition (Hobgoblin gains demonic power after rejection)
Final Carnage confrontation with full villain team

notable_level_patterns.description: Game takes place across New York city with Carnage's criminal empire centered in sewers; levels progress through different urban/criminal environments
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Sewer levels (implied from plot: Carnage begins criminal empire in sewers)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each major stage culminates in villain boss encounter; story-driven progression with named antagonists
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Shriek (second-in-command), Demogoblin (powered-up Hobgoblin), Doppelganger (six-armed Spider-Man clone), Carrion (Jackal clone)

notable_level_patterns.description: Hidden power-ups enable summoning of Marvel heroes (Captain America, Black Cat, Iron Fist, Cloak & Dagger, Deathlok, Morbius, Firestar); locations are set/predetermined
